name: Chilled Strawberry Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Process strawberries in a blender or food processor until they are pureed.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine the puréeed strawberries, tapioca, orange juice, lemon juice, cinnamon and allspice.
3. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly with a wire whisk.
4. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered over moderate heat until the mixture is thickened. The time varies; it may take up to 1 hour. Stir frequently.
5. Remove from heat. Add sugar and stir until it dissolves.
6. Refrigerate mixture until well chilled.
7. Add lemon rind and buttermilk. Mix well with a wire whisk.
8. Serve soup garnished with lime slices and sliced strawberries.
